methods.description: Collection of tissue samples from various species within the Cephalophinae and related taxa, followed by DNA extraction using different methods based on sample type.

steps.description: Tissue was sampled from 24 individuals within the Cephalophinae, representing all eighteen species recognized by the IUCN.
steps.searchable_summary: collect tissue samples from Cephalophinae species

steps.description: Sequences were obtained from Genbank for P. walteri and C. rubidus.
DNA from all bushmeat and some San Diego Zoo tissues was extracted using a standard phenol-chloroform extraction method.
The C. jentinki fecal sample was extracted using the QIAamp DNA Stool Minikit.
steps.searchable_summary: extract DNA from fecal sample using QIAamp kit

methods.description: Analysis of phylogenetic relationships using mitochondrial and nuclear DNA sequences, including tests for incongruence and topological concordance.

steps.description: The incongruence length difference test (ILD) was used to evaluate incongruence between mitochondrial genes, nuclear introns, and combined datasets.
steps.searchable_summary: perform ILD test for dataset incongruence

steps.description: Gene trees were estimated using maximum parsimony (MP), maximum likelihood (ML), and Bayesian (BA) methods.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate gene trees using MP, ML, and BA methods

steps.description: Test for topological concordance using the likelihood-based SH test.
steps.searchable_summary: perform SH test for topological concordance

methods.method_name: Bayesian Analysis and Divergence Time Estimation
methods.description: Bayesian analysis to estimate divergence times and tree topology using BEAST, considering both mitochondrial and nuclear data.

steps.description: Divergence times and tree topology were estimated using BEAST with a relaxed, uncorrelated lognormal clock model.
Bayes Factor analysis was used to investigate the effects of partitioning on the Bayesian analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Bayes Factor analysis for partitioning effects
